feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use of Project Item in 4GT Scope Id.
entry.content:
Hi,

In 4GT SCOPE ID (SOLUTION ORDER MANAGEMENT). what is the use of the project item in Manage Solution Order App? Is there a real time business scenario where we can use both service item and project item. Can you give me an example of the same?

 

Secondly, Is it possible to link an EPPM project to solution order or can we run a production cycle in professional service project

entry.title: Custom Field is not visible in Manage Journal Entries despite published status
entry.content:
In the custom fields app we have created and published a field in relation to the business context "Accounting: Coding Block".

When checking this field in apps such as Manage Journal Entries I could not add the field to the available items of the Journal Entry.

It appears the custom field has not been published correctly?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Software Component (Partner Demo Development Tenant) Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
Hello Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a software component to develop multitenant SaaS products in the partner demo development system. However, I get an error like the one below.

SCLM(Software Component Lifecycle Management) application is not configured in the current business tenant

 

 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3530333

Resolution
TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant) is being used and in this tenant only predefined Software Components exist and other software components cannot be created:
 
  • Software Component ZPARTNER => Multi-Off Development
  • Software Component ZLOCAL => System Local Development which can not be transported or deployed


This is what SAP said about the error. In this case, we seem to be unable to create a software component, but is there a different way we can proceed? I wanted to ask you about something that can be done to create a software component.

Or do we need a different partner system so that we can create software components for our developments?

If we create a development package with the namespace we have previously registered in our partner development system and develop it with the ZPARTNER software component, will we have problems in the future when offering this product as a multitenant SaaS application? How should we proceed?

Reasons for Necessity:

Dear @FrankJentsch, your valuable comments and suggestions will make a great contribution. Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: proceso de cierre de las cuentas de P&g
entry.content:

como puedo realizar al proceso de cierre de las cuentas de PyG

entry.title: 1b6 Rebate Settlement in India
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Please tell us whether we can use Rebate Settlement 1b6 for India in S4 HANA Public cloud?

entry.title: TRM module
entry.content:
Hello

My client has asked for a method to reduce the values of LC and LG In TRM module after the settlement

Can anyone help me

entry.title: Electronic Invoice Sap Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We created a simple order-to-cash flow (with only one line) and applied a standard discount, S100 - 100%. 

The SD invoice then becomes VAT-only, with a taxable amount of 0 and VAT calculated correctly (22%).

However, the electronic invoice returns an error: 
 
<Code>00422</Code>
<Description>2.2.2.5 <TaxableAmount> not calculated according to the rules defined in the technical specifications: For the invoice: 6001000142 of 2025-01-09</Description>
<Suggestion>Verify that the value of TaxableAmount present in DataSummary has been determined in compliance with the calculation requirements established in the technical specifications</Suggestion>
</Error>
</ErrorList>
 
 
The XML is structured as follows:
 
<LineDetail>
    <LineNumber>1</LineNumber>
    <Description>iPhone 11 128GB Black</Description>
    <Quantity>1.0000000</Quantity>
    <UnitOfMeasure>PZ</UnitOfMeasure>
    <UnitPrice>800.0000000</UnitPrice>
    <DiscountIncrease>
        <Type>SC</Type>
        <Percentage>100.00</Percentage>
        <Amount>800.0000000</Amount>
    </DiscountIncrease>
    <TotalPrice>0.00</TotalPrice>
    <VATRate>22.00</VATRate>
</LineDetail>
<SummaryData>
    <VATRate>22.00</VATRate>
    <TaxableAmount>800.00</TaxableAmount>
    <Tax>176.00</Tax>
    <VATCollectibility>I</VATCollectibility>
</SummaryData>
</GoodsServicesData>

Can someone give us a suggestion on how we can solve this problem?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to set role restriction in the Manage Project Demand
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding business role restrictions.

In the Manage project demand app, I want to ensure that only specific purchase groups are visible based on the user’s business role when creating a demand and assigning a purchase group.

Although I configured the restrictions in Business Role Maintenance, users can still see and assign all purchase groups, not just the restricted ones.

Could you guide me on how to properly set up these restrictions?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Display Custom Field on Purchase Requisition Items by Account Assignment
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am required to add a custom field to the Purchase Requisition Items by Account Assignment page.

I have created a field via Custom Fields app with the Business Context "Procurement: Purchase Requisition Item", but after publishing it I can't seem to find it in either Settings page or Filters.

Is it possible to add custom fields to such screen?

Regards,

entry.title: How to configure the printing of reserved vouchers?
entry.content:
1.Error occurred when configuring the output parameters for reserved printing,messsage no:APOC_OC_CONFIG115;

2.Which template to choose for pre printing reserved vouchers?

3.Is there any relevant reference material available?

entry.title: Best Practice for distributing Key Extensibility Objects in different Software Collection
entry.content:
We are planning to perform organizing our transport objects. Seeking for your guidance for the standard/ best practice of disseminating transport objects to different and proper software collection. 

  • How to categorize software collections?
  • What is the best and correct practice for assigning key user extensibilities to different kind of software collections?

entry.title: Subcontracting of equipment through maintenance order
entry.content: We have multiple pieces of equipment for which we are performing third-party refurbishment under maintenance orders. However, this functionality is not available in SAP Public Cloud. Could you please provide a workaround for internal and external refurbishment/sub-contracting through maintenance orders?

entry.title: Mass changes in outbound deliveries
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

is there any possibility to do mass changes in outbound deliveries in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

We tried find something useful but we did not find anything.

Thank you

D.

#publiccloud

entry.title: S4HC Public - Payment Status
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am missing "setup" for connect my own edited PSR format - PAIN_002_001_03 which I can easy edit in MAP FORMAT DATA - for incoming files from Banks.
But there is issue with original file - because its still using and cant be renamed / replaced...
But where is customization to set this new format /Z_PAIN_002_001_03 for example Sender + Payment message type ?

 


Many thanks with help 🙂

Best regards
Jiri Starek

entry.title: How to Change the Bank Statement Format
entry.content:
Hi!

We have a requirement to change the bank statement format configuration.

We will need to have the link between the external transaction - posting rule - acct symbol and G/L account to know how it will be the new postings with the new bank statement format.

Please, could you provide it to us?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Create Event Consumption Model in On-premise system.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm trying to create an event consumption model by following the steps from the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-event-processing-s4h-onpremise..html

and getting the below error. Could you please help me on resolving this error?

Regards,

Ramesh

entry.title: RMPS_SET_SUBSTITUTE equivalent in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there an equivalent app in Public cloud for transaction RMPS_SET_SUBSTITUTE?

Regards,

 

EDIT: FOUND IT

WORKFLOW ADMINISTRATOR APP

Then Set Substitute option.

entry.title: The statement of changes in owner's equity failed to generate an analysis view
entry.content:
#SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance；1.What is the reason for the failure to generate analytical views for the statement of changes in owner's equity and cash flow statement in SAP；

2.How to activate and configure the analysis views for the statement of changes in owner's equity and cash flow statement that have not been generated
